prompts.input: Empty PR. Just a typo fix in README. +1/-1.

PR #45: + const result = obj.config.theme.colors[mode].primary;
No check that mode is valid. obj.config could be missing if config file failed to load.

PR #47: + const data = await fetch(url).then(r => r.json());
No try/catch. No .catch on the promise. JSON parse errors will crash.

PR #48: + if (!cache.has(key)) { cache.set(key, await load(key)); }
Concurrent calls for same key → multiple loads. No memoization in flight.
PR #49: 'Bump dep foo from 1.2.3 to 1.2.4'. Diff: package.json +1 line, lock +5. No code changes.
